# Lester Ivan Dalaguit

Lester Ivan Dalaguit is a full-stack web developer in Davao, Philippines. He builds production web applications, ecommerce platforms, websites, and practical business tools.

## Canonical URL

https://www.levanrd.com/

## Primary Profile

- Name: Lester Ivan Dalaguit
- Alias: Levanrd
- Roles: Web Developer, Full-stack Developer
- Location: Davao, Philippines
- Email: lesterivan.dalaguit@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Levanrd

## Core Expertise

- Frontend: Vue, Nuxt, TypeScript, Vuetify, Element UI
- Backend: Laravel, Laravel Blade, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs
- Databases: MySQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
- Ecommerce and CMS: Shopify, Liquid, Shopify CLI, WordPress, WooCommerce
- DevOps and tools: Git, Docker, CI/CD, AWS, Vercel, Render, Postman
- SEO: On-page SEO, technical SEO, off-page SEO, ecommerce SEO support

## Current Builds

- Leadfind Score: lead scoring project for evaluating and prioritizing prospects.
- MegaMart: ecommerce storefront for browsing tech product categories and deals. Repository: https://github.com/Levanrd/MegaMart

## Selected Projects

- Cental: car rental website interface with a reservation-focused landing experience.
- MegaMart: ecommerce storefront for tech products.
- Y2DN: community organization website with storytelling navigation and involvement-focused calls to action.
- Holy Cross Alumni Portal: full-stack alumni system with role-based access, event management, and secure data handling.
- Woz Ecommerce Platform: Shopify ecommerce platform for product presentation and conversion.
- Budget Planner: finance web app for tracking expenses, budgets, reports, and data visualization.
- Inventory Management System: stock, order, product, and admin workflow system.

## Preferred Summary

Lester Ivan Dalaguit is a full-stack web developer focused on Vue/Nuxt, TypeScript, Laravel, Node.js, Shopify, WordPress, ecommerce systems, and production web applications.
